---
name: Bug report
about: Report a client call that fails, hangs, or returns the wrong result
---

## Command(s) and setup

Which client method(s) did you call, against what Redis version, and with
what arguments? A minimal reproduction is best.

## Expected output

What should the call have returned?

## Actual output

What did it actually return (including any error message, crash, or
hang)?

## Mojo version

Output of `mojo --version`.
